# Tikeo docs for LLMs

Tikeo is a Rust-native distributed task scheduling and workflow orchestration platform.

High-value pages:

- /docs/ — overview
- /docs/getting-started/quickstart — Server + Web + Worker quickstart
- /docs/concepts/worker-tunnel — outbound-only Worker Tunnel model
- /docs/concepts/workflows — workflow DAG model
- /docs/sdks/rust — Rust Worker SDK
- /docs/sdks/go — Go Worker SDK
- /docs/sdks/java-spring-boot — Java Spring Boot Starter
- /docs/deployment/docker-compose — Docker Compose path
- /docs/deployment/kubernetes — Kubernetes and Helm boundaries
- /docs/reference/configuration — configuration reference
- /docs/reference/troubleshooting — troubleshooting
